changelog:
- Added first-run setup wizard (Cloud / Light / Heavy selection)
- Added distro selection step with auto-detection from /etc/os-release
- Added hardware scanner (lspci, lsusb, lsmod, dmesg, DKMS, nvidia-smi)
- Added daemoniq hardware command
- Added deep driver knowledge (GPU, Wi-Fi, audio, DKMS, Secure Boot, firmware)
- Added version control system (daemoniq version, update, rollback)
- Added daemoniq uninstall command for clean self-removal
- Simplified installer — silent install, one optional prompt
- Connected update system to JayRaj21/DaemonIQ on GitHub
- Fixed NameError: import os missing before hardware snapshot definition
- Fixed GitHub branch URL (main → master)
- Replaced automatic update system with manual patch application
- daemoniq update now accepts a local patch file path
- Removed network dependency from update command
- Removed Cloud (Groq API) variant — no API dependencies
- Renamed variants: light → imp, heavy → daemon
- Renamed 'daemon' background process to 'demon' throughout
- Renamed heavy variant from daemon to herald (avoids confusion with background process)
- Applied subtle thematic naming (consulting the ether, memory wiped, etc.)
- DAEMON_LABEL updated to daemoniq-demon (runtime paths)
- Renamed herald variant to sovereign
- New banner art with flame wisps and ⛧ sigil accents
- Default distro selection now correctly uses auto-detected distro
- Updated banner with larger art and subtle demonic accents
- Fixed setup wizard distro default to always use auto-detected distro
- Redesigned banner with demon horns framing the logo
- Tagline updated with occult sigil characters
- Setup wizard distro default now always uses detected distro (falls back to Ubuntu)
- Redesigned banner: full DaemonIQ name in ANSI Shadow, pentacle (⛤) corner decoration
- Setup wizard distro default now correctly uses auto-detected distro
- Banner redesigned: full DaemonIQ name, trident motifs flanking each side, red colour
- Banner: full DaemonIQ in red, trident motifs flanking each side
- Fixed banner: replaced Unicode box-drawing chars with plain ASCII (wider terminal compatibility)
- Fixed installer: auto-start prompt changed from [y/N] to [y/n]
- Restored block letter (██) banner text with ASCII-only trident motif
- Fixed NameError: _setup_ollama was missing from setup wizard
- Fixed _pull_model calling 'imp' instead of 'ollama' (bad rename collision)
- Replaced trident motif with ASCII pentacle on banner
- Fixed installer banner to match program banner style
- Fixed all [y/N] prompts to [y/n] across installer and program
- Fixed pentacle layout: moved to corner placement, no longer overflows
- Added arrow key navigation for all setup wizard selections
- Combined install and setup into a single flow — no second step needed
- Installer banner updated to match program banner style
- Removed pentacle decoration from banner — clean block letters only
- Redesigned I in banner: wider serif style to distinguish it from adjacent letters
- Removed all motif decorations from banner — clean block letters only
- Fixed SyntaxWarning: invalid escape sequence on startup (grep commands)
- Removed duplicate banner in setup wizard when launched from installer
- Removed 'Starting setup wizard...' message — seamless install→setup transition
- Removed leftover Sovereign text block from model selection
- Renamed 'tier' to 'model' in setup wizard prompt
- Model download is now automatic — no prompt required
- Removed distro/model/pkg info header from REPL — use 'info' command instead
- Removed 'Bound N shell commands to memory' startup message
- Merged status and distro commands into single 'info' command
- Increased Ollama request timeout from 120s to 600s for CPU-only machines
- Increased socket timeout from 90s to 660s
- 'consulting the ether...' indicator now stays visible during long requests
- Fixed SyntaxWarning on startup (hardware scanner grep escape sequences)
- Clarified exit vs stop in help text
- Renamed 'exit' to 'close' in REPL for clarity (exit/quit still work)
- Simplified uninstall — single confirmation prompt, no verbose item list
- Rewrote help menu: proper title, grouped commands, clear descriptions, removed session lines
- Help menu: close/quit/q shown as one entry
- Help menu: stop/end shown as one entry, 'end' added as alias for stop
